title: IKAI readies capex of IDR 40 billion in 2025
body: PT Intikeramik Alamasri Industri Tbk (IKAI) is allocating capital expenditure (capex) of IDR 40 billion for 2025.

title: Final trading day in 2024, JCI closed higher at 7,079.90
body: Jakarta Stock Price Composite Index (JCI) was closed 0.62% or 43.33 points higher at 7,079.90 on this last day of transaction in 2024.

title: End-of-year, net foreign closed at 385 million shares of net sell
body: Foreign investor transactions on the final trading day of 2024 ended with 384.96 million shares of net sell.

title: Peaking, BRMS scored net foreign of 96.24 million shares
body: PT Bumi Resources Minerals Tbk (BRMS) registered net foreign of 96.24 million shares, leading the Net Foreign leaderboard at the end of Monday’s (30/12) transaction.

title: INPP eyes IDR 500 billion through bond issuance
body: PT Indonesia Paradise Property Tbk (INPP) is issuing Bond I Year 2025 worth IDR 500 billion in two series.

title: Peaking, BRMS scored net foreign of 96.24 million shares

title: INPP eyes IDR 500 billion through bond issuance
body: PT Indonesia Paradise Property Tbk (INPP) is issuing Bond I Year 2025 worth IDR 500 billion in two series.

title: CCSI sets up rights issue to welcome Singaporean investor
body: PT Communication Cable Systems Indonesia Tbk (CCSI) is preparing to conduct a Rights Issue, or Capital Increase with Pre-emptive Rights (PMHMETD), amounting to 133.33 million new shares.

title: BSSR to issue interim dividend of USD 25 million, see the schedule and yield here
body: PT Baramulti Suksessarana Tbk (BSSR) is set to distribute an interim dividend for the 2024 fiscal year, amounting to USD 25 million, or approximately IDR 154.39 per share.

title: Big market cap banking stocks collectively slipped
body: Banks with big market capitalisation showed collective slippages at the morning session in the last week of 2024.

title: BRPT to secure IDR 700 billion loan from BTN
body: PT Barito Pacific Tbk (BRPT) manages to score corporate credit facility worth IDR 700 billion from PT Bank Tabungan Negara (Persero) Tbk (BBTN).

title: Post-debt-conversion, HRUM confident of entering nickel industry
body: PT Harum Energy Tbk (HRUM) is gaining optimism in the nickel industry after succeeding in swapping debt to equity for two of its subsidiaries, PT Tanito Harum Nickel (THN) and PT Harum Nickel Perkasa (HNP).

title: BNLI grants IDR 2 trillion loan to TOWR’s subsidiaries
body: Five subsidiaries of PT Sarana Menara Nusantara Tbk. (TOWR) have secured a loan worth IDR 2 trillion from PT Bank Permata Tbk (BNLI).

title: CCSI to establish 2 new subsidiaries, purpose revealed
body: PT Communication Cable Systems Indonesia Tbk (CCSI), a company engaged in the fibre optic and electric cable industry, has officially established two new subsidiaries called PT CCSI Niagatama Digital and PT Lucky Joint Indonesia.

title: State-owned companies boosted JCI by 0.75% last week
body: Jakarta Stock Price Composite Index (JCI) saw 0.75% or 52.71-points increase to 7,036.57 last week, led by some of blue-chip state-owned stocks.

title: Startel Communication to raise stakes in HELI
body: PT Startel Communication (SC) has increased its portion in PT Jaya Trishindo Tbk (HELI) by 2.4 million shares in a transaction last week (24/12).

title: TOWR to postpone rights issue of IDR 4.5 trillion, management reveals the reason
body: PT Sarana Menara Nusantara Tbk (TOWR) is reportedly postponing the capital increase with pre-emptive rights, or rights issue, which is still reporting pending approval from the Financial Services Authority (OJK).

title: Diversifying portfolio, CUAN to produce metallurgical coals
body: PT Petrindo Jaya Kreasi Tbk (CUAN) has reportedly produced metallurgical coals in order to diversify its business portfolio.

title: Foreign investment transactions resulted in net sell of nearly 16 million shares
body: On Friday, December 27, the stock exchange saw a net sell of 15.98 million shares from foreign investors.

title: BFI Finance ready to pay off maturing bonds next year
body: Funds for the repayment of bond principal and interest have been fully prepared from the company's internal funds

title: Green Power Group (LABA) prepares rights issue and renewable energy projects
body: The project is in line with the company's vision of making renewable energy a key pillar of business growth.

title: Pan Brothers managed to get away from bankruptcy
body: ‘The company's business activities and operations continue to run normally.’

title: PTRO to carry out 1:10 stock split
body: The nominal value of PTRO shares will change from IDR 50 per share to IDR 5 per share.

title: BNI digital transformation via ‘Wondr’ application
body: Innovation Hub offers a startup-like working atmosphere.

title: Bakrieland acquires Aston Sidoarjo manager
body: ELTY is optimistic that this acquisition will increase revenue.

title: SMPN turns SIDO waste into ‘jamu’ supplement to fatten cows
body: Cattle can gain an average of almost 3 kilograms per day.

title: A total of 2.24 billion shares are sold; net foreign volume closed at -586 million shares
body: JAKARTA - On Tuesday, December 24, foreign transactions totaled 2.24 billion shares sold and 1.66 billion shares bought. Based on these two data points, the net foreign volume was -586.11 million shares.

title: IHSG returns to red zone, down 0.43% to 7,065.7
body: PT Agro Yasa Lestari Tbk (AYLS) sits at top position in Top Gainers.

title: TOWR to distribute interim dividend of IDR 300.22 billion
body: As of September 30 2024, TOWR had posted a net profit of IDR 2.45 trillion.

title: Indomobil director confirms Nissan-Honda merger plan
body: IMAS is Nissan's distributor in Indonesia. Meanwhile, Honda brand vehicles are under the auspices of PT Honda Prospect Motor.

title: 375 million Cerestar Indonesia (TRGU) shares bought by Sunterra Indonesia
body: On Friday, December 20, PT Sunterra Indonesia raised its stake in PT Cerestar Indonesia Tbk (TRGU), a company that produces wheat flour. This investor increased its shares from 21.58% to 26.3% after buying 375 million shares through PT Victoria Sekuritas Indonesia.

title: BNI scores IDR 19.81 trillion in net profit
body: The net profit was supported by lending which grew 10.96% to IDR739.53 trillion.

title: Golden Energy Mines increases Trisula's capital
body: Trisula is the operating subsidiary of GEMS.

title: Japanese investors to buy 25% of Hero Global Investment shares after IPO
body: Japan's Shikoku Electric Power will buy a 25% stake in PT Hero Global Investment Tbk (HGII) from the controlling shareholder after the Initial Public Offering (IPO).

title: Need working capital, Trimegah Sekuritas offers IDR 303.2 billion bonds
body: PT Trimegah Sekuritas Indonesia Tbk (TRIM) will issue Shelf Registration Bonds I Phase III Year 2025 with a principal amount of IDR 303.2 billion.

title: Net profit slows down, Campina unveils strategy to face competitors
body: CAMP outlined some of its strategies in dealing with new players in the ice cream market, amidst slowing net profit performance

title: JCI moved up 1.61% to 7,096.45 supported by BBRI and BMRI
body: The Composite Stock Price Index (JCI) closed up 1.61% or 112.58 points to 7,096.45 on Monday (23/12).
